name: San Antonio Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 large Whole chicken breasts, split, boned and skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into 1/2 inch cubes.
2. Combine Pace Picante Sauce, cumin and salt in a skillet.
3. Cook chicken in the Pace Picante Sauce mixture, stirring frequently, until cooked through - about 4 minutes.
4. Transfer contents of skillet to a mixing bowl; cover and chill thoroughly.
5. To serve, combine chicken mixture, sour cream and mayonnaise; mix well.
6. Peel, seed and coarsely chop avocado. Add avocado and celery to chicken mixture; mix lightly.
7. Spoon onto lettuce-lined salad plates; sprinkle with bacon.
8. Serve with additional Pace Picante Sauce.
